## Skill name

*[Proposed name — kebab-case, e.g., `migrate-doctor`. Should be a verb or role.]*

## What it does (one sentence)

*[Trigger description as it would appear in SKILL.md's YAML — short, action-focused, names the trigger phrases.]*

## Trigger phrases

What does the user say to invoke this skill?

- *"phrase 1"*
- *"phrase 2"*
- *"phrase 3"*

## The 4-step protocol

How does the skill work, in 4 steps?

1. *[step 1]*
2. *[step 2]*
3. *[step 3]*
4. *[step 4]*

## Doctrine integration

How does this skill write back to `~/ai-doctrine.md`?

- What gets saved?
- Which PURE category does it fit (Prime / Understand / Refine / Execute / Trap)?

## Why this should exist

*[Real-world friction this solves. Tell a short story — when you wished you had this skill.]*

## Existing skill overlap

Does this overlap with the current 7? If yes, justify why it's a new skill instead of an extension of an existing one.

## Anything else?

*[References, prior art, alternatives considered.]*
